lines.speaker: Belona
lines.text: Hello human.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you do here?

lines.speaker: Belona
lines.text: This guild contains minerals that haven't been found anywhere else. I'm here to try and identify them.

lines.speaker: Belona
lines.text: If you come across any unusual minerals when mining here I'll take them off your hands. Don't worry, I'll make it worth your while.

lines.speaker: Belona
lines.text: I've also been digging out this cave recently. I found a bunch of amethyst in there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What can you offer me?

lines.speaker: Belona
lines.text: I have some gloves that will help you when Mining. When you wear these gloves you'll find that some rocks will instantly respawn.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do they do that?

lines.speaker: Belona
lines.text: Magic!

lines.speaker: Belona
lines.text: Beyond that, I could consider letting you access this new cave. It seems to contain even more minerals.

lines.speaker: Belona
lines.text: So, what would you like?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like access to the cave.

lines.speaker: Belona
lines.text: Now hold on. There's a lot of minerals in there, and digging out the cave was hard work. Only a true friend of Falador would be allowed in there.

lines.speaker: Belona
lines.text: You don't seem like you're quite there yet. Come speak to me again once you have completed the Elite Falador Achievement Diary.

lines.speaker: Belona
lines.text: And you truly are a friend of Falador. Well done on completing the Elite Falador Achievement Diary. Go on in, you may access the cave.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's all thank you.

lines.speaker: Belona
lines.text: Don't forget to come to me if you find any minerals.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't want to receive minerals.

lines.speaker: Belona
lines.text: Very well. You'll no longer find any minerals when you mine here. If you change your mind just let me know.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to receive minerals.

lines.speaker: Belona
lines.text: As you wish. You'll now find minerals when you mine here. Let me know if you want to change this.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you combine my mining gloves?

lines.speaker: Belona
lines.text: I guess I could combine some Mining gloves with some Superior mining gloves. These new gloves would require 70 Mining to equip.

lines.speaker: Belona
lines.text: It wouldn't be free though. I'd want 40 minerals in return.

lines.speaker: Belona
lines.text: You don't have any gloves for me to combine. You'll need to bring me some Mining gloves and some Superior mining gloves.

lines.speaker: Belona
lines.text: There you go. I've combined your gloves into some Expert mining gloves. Enjoy.

lines.speaker: Belona
lines.text: Fair enough. I'll be here if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's all thank you.

lines.speaker: Belona
lines.text: Don't forget to come to me if you find any minerals.

sections.title: Attempting to enter the diary amethyst mine without granted access

lines.speaker: Belona
lines.text: Hey, you! You're not allowed in there! Come speak to me first.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry.
